location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation with no compound failure mode or mechanism of interaction between defects stated.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. the mutable `seen` default 'persists IDs across calls, causing later sync runs to silently skip legitimate updates.'
